projects.name: Community Management System
projects.description: Built a scalable backend with Spring Boot supporting real-time messaging for 1000+ concurrent users with 50+ REST APIs, JWT authentication, role-based access control, and automated API validation.

projects.name: Distributed File Transfer System
projects.description: Designed a distributed file-sharing system supporting simultaneous multi-file transfers using TCP and two-phase UDP multicast with fault tolerance and admin-controlled permission-based access.

projects.name: Tree Tracking System
projects.description: Built automated pipeline using drone imagery and YOLOv11 to detect, count trees, and verify plantation claims without manual audits.

projects.name: Network Intrusion Detection System
projects.description: Built DDoS detection system using network traffic analysis, PyShark, CICFlowMeter, and XGBoost, achieving 99% accuracy with real-time classification proactive intrusion.
